positive: A whimsical and enchanting forest clearing scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent fireflies and softly glowing mushrooms, centered on a majestic, sleeping forest fox with an elegant, minimalist silhouette. The overall style is a blend of Art Nouveau and Pacific Northwest folk art, rendered with clean, bold linework and sophisticated flat color blocks. The color palette should be deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, muted gold accents, and creamy off-white. Emphasize strong outlines and high contrast for maximum print pop, suitable for a T-shirt graphic. Composition should be perfectly centered with the main subject occupying the middle third, using negative space effectively. Conceptually, the design should evoke dreamlike tranquility and mystery. Highly detailed, vector-like quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, blur, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, messy, noisy, grain, smudge, poorly drawn, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, cartoonish, hyperdetailed, realistic shadows
